title: EXTREME
content:
_This entry was deleted but I managed to get it back from the feed. I have to keep this one. ;)_

[Leopard][1] is SOOO EXTREME!!! Can't wait for November to come!!! (Because I don't think we'll have 10.5 in October here.) (You must watch the demos.)

Oh and [Safari 3 Beta][2] is now available for Windows (and Macintosh). That's extreme too. :D (You can 'resize' textarea in form!)

_(Originally posted: 6/12/07 9:01 AM)_

(It's a parenthesis day today.)

[1]: http://www.apple.com/macosx/leopard/
[2]: http://www.apple.com/safari/
